title: chloraea bidentata
intro: Chloraea bidentata, also known as the two-toothed greenhood, is a species of orchid native to New Zealand. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chloraea bidentata include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
